prompt: Quick facts on Westfield — contract value, current phase, and project address.

failures: expected at least one of [getProjectDetails] to fire — none did
observations: tools fired: backendDeepAgentProjectStatus, project_lookup, packet_reader, teams_reader, meetings_reader, emails_reader, documents_reader, financials_reader, schedule_reader, rfi_reader, submittal_reader, deepagents_runtime
score.finalText:
Bottom line: Westfield Collective is in Current phase, but the structured project record does not have a populated address, and the formal contract value currently shows as $0 in the PM budget summary. Operationally, it looks like closeout/activation is underway, so I would treat the $0 financials as a data gap until someone reconciles the ERP/budget record.

Evidence
- The project record for Westfield Collective shows phase = Current and job number = 24-115; the address field is blank. Source: PM database `projects` row for id 43.
- The PM budget summary shows original budget = $0, revised budget = $0, and revised prime contract = $0. Source: `project_budget_summary` / PM database.
- The project briefing snapshot says the job is in “closeout / activation mode,” with grand opening completed or imminent, but there are still warranty, punch-list, and payment workflow issues. Source: `project_briefing_snapshot` on 2026-06-09.
- Recent email activity on 2026-06-08 shows active follow-up on roll-up counter doors and a duct sweating issue, which fits a job that is still being closed out, not truly dormant. Sources: `search_emails` results dated 2026-06-08.
- Structured coverage is thin where it matters: meetings, RFIs, and submittals are marked missing in the provided source coverage, so the cleanest read is incomplete. Source: user-provided source coverage.

What this means
This is not a clean closeout record yet. The phase is Current, but the contract/budget fields are either not loaded or not reconciled, and the active email trail says there are still live punch/warranty items. If someone uses the current financial summary as a final truth set, they’ll probably tell themselves a false story.

Recommended next steps
- Brandon/PM: confirm the actual contract value from the prime contract or ERP record before using any owner-facing number.
- PM team: fill the project address in the structured project record if it’s missing; that’s basic hygiene.
- Closeout owner: reconcile the open warranty/punch/payment items before calling the job truly done.

Uncertainty
- I could not confirm a real contract dollar value from the structured records; the only formal number returned was $0, which likely reflects missing or unreconciled data.
- The project address is not populated in the project table, so I cannot give you one without guessing.
- Because meetings/RFIs/submittals are missing in the provided coverage, this is a partial operator read, not a full closeout audit.

Source coverage note: meetings: missing; rfi: missing; submittal: missing. I did not use unavailable or stale source categories as factual support.

sources.title: RE: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors
sources.snippet:
Subject: RE: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors
Date: 2026-06-08T12:18:19Z
From: James Wallace <james@midwestgaragedoors.com>
To: Andrew Cannon <acannon@alleatogroup.com>

Andrew The rolling door manufacturers have a way of dragging things out so I would not count on them getting back with me today. I will let you know as soon as I hear something.       James Wallace Midwest Garage Doors 437 east stop 18 road Greenwood, Indiana 46143 1-317-889-9500   F

sources.title: Re: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors
sources.snippet:
Subject: Re: Alleato Group: Westfield Collective: Roll Up Counter Doors
Date: 2026-06-08T11:56:51Z
From: Andrew Cannon <acannon@alleatogroup.com>
To: James Wallace <james@midwestgaragedoors.com>

James,  Understood, I will keep my eye out for a call or email. It would be great to have an update back today or tomorrow if possible.  Thank you, Andrew Cannon    Assistant Project Manager at Alleato Group Mobile  317.315.3968 |   Email   acannon@alleatogroup.com Web
